## Use Case

What career-readiness problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the track, mode, template, script, or docs change.

## Safety Checks

- [ ] This does not require fake claims or fake metrics.
- [ ] This does not automate spam or unreviewed applications.
- [ ] This keeps private career data out of git.
